_readme: Ground truth for the Touch 'n Go input type. Values are copied from the PRINTED per-card summary lines in the sample transaction history (owner to eyeball-verify both card summary rows on the PDF). The harness asserts against this file, never against pipeline output. Amounts in RM. derived_opening_balance = card_balance + usage_total + other_charges - reload_total.

assertions: Per card: opening + reloads - usage - other charges = closing, exactly.
Every consecutive row within a card must satisfy the running-balance chain.
Usage rows are expenses; Reload rows are transfers and are NEVER counted as expenses.
Description comes from Exit Location (owner decision); Sector is the category hint.
